records.ety: [From the native South American name: cf. F. pcari, Sp. pecar.]

defs: A pachyderm of the genus Dicotyles.
notes: ☞ The collared peccary, or tajacu (Dicotyles torquatus), is about the size and shape of a small hog, and has a white ring aroung the neck. It ranges from Arkansas to Brazil. A larger species (Dicotyles labiatus), with white cheeks, is found in South America.
